역대상 2:1.content: These are the sons of Israel: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issachar, Zebulun,

역대상 2:2.content: Dan, Joseph, Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.

역대상 2:3.content: The sons of Judah: Er, Onan, and Shelah; which three were born to him of Shua’s daughter the Canaanitess. Er, Judah’s firstborn, was wicked in Yahweh’s sight; and he killed him.

역대상 2:4.content: Tamar his daughter-in-law bore him Perez and Zerah. All the sons of Judah were five.

역대상 2:5.content: The sons of Perez: Hezron and Hamul.

역대상 2:6.content: The sons of Zerah: Zimri, Ethan, Heman, Calcol, and Dara; five of them in all.

역대상 2:7.content: The son of Carmi: Achar, the troubler of Israel, who committed a trespass in the devoted thing.

역대상 2:9.content: The sons also of Hezron, who were born to him: Jerahmeel, Ram, and Chelubai.

역대상 2:10.content: Ram became the father of Amminadab, and Amminadab became the father of Nahshon, prince of the children of Judah;

역대상 2:11.content: and Nahshon became the father of Salma, and Salma became the father of Boaz,

역대상 2:12.content: and Boaz became the father of Obed, and Obed became the father of Jesse;

역대상 2:13.content: and Jesse became the father of his firstborn Eliab, and Abinadab the second, and Shimea the third,

역대상 2:14.content: Nethanel the fourth, Raddai the fifth,

역대상 2:15.content: Ozem the sixth, David the seventh;

역대상 2:16.content: and their sisters were Zeruiah and Abigail. The sons of Zeruiah: Abishai, Joab, and Asahel, three.

역대상 2:17.content: Abigail bore Amasa; and the father of Amasa was Jether the Ishmaelite.

역대상 2:18.content: Caleb the son of Hezron became the father of children of Azubah his wife, and of Jerioth; and these were her sons: Jesher, Shobab, and Ardon.

역대상 2:19.content: Azubah died, and Caleb married Ephrath, who bore him Hur.

역대상 2:20.content: Hur became the father of Uri, and Uri became the father of Bezalel.

역대상 2:21.content: Afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Gilead, whom he took as wife when he was sixty years old; and she bore him Segub.

역대상 2:22.content: Segub became the father of Jair, who had twenty-three cities in the land of Gilead.

역대상 2:23.content: Geshur and Aram took the towns of Jair from them, with Kenath, and its villages, even sixty cities. All these were the sons of Machir the father of Gilead.

역대상 2:24.content: After Hezron died in Caleb Ephrathah, Abijah Hezron’s wife bore him Ashhur the father of Tekoa.

역대상 2:25.content: The sons of Jerahmeel the firstborn of Hezron were Ram the firstborn, Bunah, Oren, Ozem, and Ahijah.

역대상 2:26.content: Jerahmeel had another wife, whose name was Atarah. She was the mother of Onam.

역대상 2:27.content: The sons of Ram the firstborn of Jerahmeel were Maaz, Jamin, and Eker.

역대상 2:28.content: The sons of Onam were Shammai and Jada. The sons of Shammai: Nadab and Abishur.

역대상 2:29.content: The name of the wife of Abishur was Abihail; and she bore him Ahban and Molid.

역대상 2:30.content: The sons of Nadab: Seled and Appaim; but Seled died without children.

역대상 2:31.content: The son of Appaim: Ishi. The son of Ishi: Sheshan. The son of Sheshan: Ahlai.

역대상 2:32.content: The sons of Jada the brother of Shammai: Jether and Jonathan; and Jether died without children.

역대상 2:33.content: The sons of Jonathan: Peleth and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.

역대상 2:34.content: Now Sheshan had no sons, but daughters. Sheshan had a servant, an Egyptian, whose name was Jarha.

역대상 2:35.content: Sheshan gave his daughter to Jarha his servant as wife; and she bore him Attai.

역대상 2:36.content: Attai became the father of Nathan, and Nathan became the father of Zabad,

역대상 2:37.content: and Zabad became the father of Ephlal, and Ephlal became the father of Obed,

역대상 2:38.content: and Obed became the father of Jehu, and Jehu became the father of Azariah,

역대상 2:39.content: and Azariah became the father of Helez, and Helez became the father of Eleasah,

역대상 2:40.content: and Eleasah became the father of Sismai, and Sismai became the father of Shallum,

역대상 2:41.content: and Shallum became the father of Jekamiah, and Jekamiah became the father of Elishama.

역대상 2:42.content: The sons of Caleb the brother of Jerahmeel were Mesha his firstborn, who was the father of Ziph; and the sons of Mareshah the father of Hebron.

역대상 2:43.content: The sons of Hebron: Korah, Tappuah, Rekem, and Shema.

역대상 2:44.content: Shema became the father of Raham, the father of Jorkeam; and Rekem became the father of Shammai.

역대상 2:45.content: The son of Shammai was Maon; and Maon was the father of Beth Zur.

역대상 2:46.content: Ephah, Caleb’s concubine, bore Haran, Moza, and Gazez; and Haran became the father of Gazez.

역대상 2:47.content: The sons of Jahdai: Regem, Jothan, Geshan, Pelet, Ephah, and Shaaph.

역대상 2:48.content: Maacah, Caleb’s concubine, bore Sheber and Tirhanah.

역대상 2:49.content: She bore also Shaaph the father of Madmannah, Sheva the father of Machbena, and the father of Gibea; and the daughter of Caleb was Achsah.

역대상 2:50.content: These were the sons of Caleb, the son of Hur, the firstborn of Ephrathah: Shobal the father of Kiriath Jearim,

역대상 2:51.content: Salma the father of Bethlehem, and Hareph the father of Beth Gader.

역대상 2:52.content: Shobal the father of Kiriath Jearim had sons: Haroeh, half of the Menuhoth.

역대상 2:53.content: The families of Kiriath Jearim: the Ithrites, the Puthites, the Shumathites, and the Mishraites; from them came the Zorathites and the Eshtaolites.

역대상 2:54.content: The sons of Salma: Bethlehem, the Netophathites, Atroth Beth Joab, and half of the Manahathites, the Zorites.

역대상 2:55.content: The families of scribes who lived at Jabez: the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, and the Sucathites. These are the Kenites who came from Hammath, the father of the house of Rechab.
